channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10.5%.

item.title: BBC Politics: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues
item.description: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Can Andy Burnham actually beat Reform to take on Starmer? Here’s what the data shows
item.description: Can Andy Burnham actually beat Reform to take on Starmer? Here’s what the data shows

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Streeting allies say he will run in leadership contest - despite him backing Burnham for Makerfield by-election
item.description: Starmer latest: Streeting allies say he will run in leadership contest - despite him backing Burnham for Makerfield by-election

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Trump warns it will be ‘tough’ for Starmer to survive as prime minister
item.description: Trump warns it will be ‘tough’ for Starmer to survive as prime minister

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting backs Burnham for return to Westminster, saying he is Labour’s best chance of winning byelection – UK politics live
item.description: Streeting backs Burnham for return to Westminster, saying he is Labour’s best chance of winning byelection – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: I hope this isn’t true. There are times when it’s more important to put country before party. This is one of them. Burnham’s longstanding commitment to a fairer voting system could transform our democracy & counter ...
item.description: I hope this isn’t true. There are times when it’s more important to put country before party. This is one of them. Burnham’s longstanding commitment to a fairer voting system could transform our democracy & counter ...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer accused of ‘withholding’ documents from Mandelson probe
item.description: Starmer accused of ‘withholding’ documents from Mandelson probe

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): From Team Reeves to Manchesterism: Labour’s four economic camps explained
item.description: From Team Reeves to Manchesterism: Labour’s four economic camps explained

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Case in point. One of my neighbours asked me if Keir Starmer was going to go. I said, yeah, it was just a matter of time. They replied that it would be a shame not to have the prime minister as our MP anymore and then...
item.description: Case in point. One of my neighbours asked me if Keir Starmer was going to go. I said, yeah, it was just a matter of time. They replied that it would be a shame not to have the prime minister as our MP anymore and then...

item.title: FT UK Politics: Labour’s faultlines are back with a vengeance
item.description: Labour’s faultlines are back with a vengeance
